en.atmosphere: Single-line terminus. Bedroom community with 45,590 daily riders.
en.landmarks: Decent parks (212k sqm). Nature pockets scattered.
en.food: 51 restaurants, mostly Japanese chains. Few standouts.
en.nightlife: Active izakaya scene (22 late spots). Karaoke sparse.

ja.food: 飲食店51軒。チェーン多め。地元店少ない。
ja.nightlife: 夜間営業22軒。11時過ぎ静か。
